channel.title: Mental Health on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Mental Health on MinWeb

item.title: Trump and Joe Rogan’s New Executive Order on Psychedelics
item.description: Explore the details of the new Executive Order on psychedelic medicine, how it impacts federal funding and FDA review processes, and what it means for your...

item.title: How Changing Your Self-Talk Can Transform Your Life
item.description: Learn how to break free from negative thought loops and harness the power of a growth mindset to rewire your brain and transform your life for the better.

item.title: Why "So What?" Is Not the Cure for Workplace Stress
item.description: Stop the cycle of chronic workplace stress by learning how to balance high-stakes professional accountability with the perspective needed to prevent burnout.

item.title: The Case for Body Silence: Why You Should Stop Commenting
item.description: Stop commenting on people's bodies to protect their mental and physical well-being by choosing the respectful, scientifically-backed practice of body silence.

item.title: Why You Should Stop Commenting on People’s Bodies
item.description: Learn why commenting on people's bodies—even with good intentions—can cause lasting harm and discover why choosing to mind your own business is better for all.
